entry.title: Perihelion
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,388Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 22

Summary: Two years after the gala. The orbit has found its shape. Dinners almost every night. Out three times a week. Saturdays are films. Sundays are newspapers and coffee and not checking the time. The mug is on the left side of the kitchen. The shoes are in the hallway. The arm is still there every morning. Every day is a good day. Bruce has questions he's been sitting on since the east wall. Clark has answers — some of them. The ones that are his to give. There's also the small matter of what Bruce says out loud at the Kerth ceremony. In front of witnesses. — Book Two of the Aphelion trilogy. Established relationship. Explicit throughout. The bruises are a love language now. Both directions.

entry.title: Where the stars cross
entry.summary:
Author: ThatStupidTheAlien

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,147Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 199

Summary: Soulmates exist, and Bruce Wayne hasn’t found his… maybe Superman can help him understand the marks on his body, or Clark Kent can help him forget that he even wants a soulmate.

entry.title: Make the Batfam Bigger.
entry.summary:
Author: Funfactyoudontknowme (V413X)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,994Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 184

Summary: That time Bruce Wayne thought his husband was suddenly interested in pregnancy kinks, and let him do what he wanted. That time Clark kent, forgot his husband does not know all the things Aliens are capable of doing if they put their minds to it, and got his man pregnant. Crack fic idea for my friend.

entry.title: Face My Fears
entry.summary:
Author: MysticRose1992

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,515Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 3,789

Summary: During what Red Hood thought was just a routine check of all of the warehouses in his territory, making sure no new gang was going to start a gang war, he stumbles upon a scene that would haunt his nightmares. A Death Cult about to sacrifice a child that could be no older than 4. After dealing with the cult members, Jason finds himself the new caretaker of a 4 year old toddler that also happens to be able to turn invisible when startled. What could possibly go wrong?

entry.title: Everything is Grey
entry.summary:
Author: InterStella89

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,265Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 111

Summary: Clark Kent and Bruce Wayne are going strong after two years of dating. But just as they were about to ask the question, an unknown threat arrive that not only plots to take over Earth but with expose a dark secret that could change their life forever. They must join forces with old and new friends while facing an alien army with the aid of an old arch-nemesis. ((Sequel to Everything is Blue))

entry.title: How Long Has This Been Going On?
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,550Chapters: 11/12Kudos: 201

Summary: “On the roof. I know what it was,” The boy said. “What was it? What did you see?” Clark said, glancing around. “It was Death I think?” He replied. “Death? What does that mean?” “Death was watching,” John began matter of factly, raising a hand to point behind Clark, “Death was watching and he was looking at you.” Quickly, Clark whipped his head to look in the direction John was pointing. He turned just quickly enough to see a wisp of black disappear behind a building. OR Batman stalks the hell out of Superman. Bruce Wayne is intrigued by Clark Kent. Superman is horrified by Batman. Bumbling reporter Clark Kent can’t seem to figure Bruce Wayne out. Identity mishaps occur. Idea from @lescrenti ‘s TikTok!New chapter every other day sorta :/

entry.title: The Last Flight of the Bat
entry.summary:
Author: ya3ani

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,090Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: The Batfamily want to give an aging Bruce one last chance to punch bad guys in Gotham. Everything goes according to plan (...just not their plan). Leaning his chair back on two legs, Terry looked around the derelict warehouse, everyone forming a semi-circle around Damian as he presented. Though the surroundings were a far cry from the Justice League HQ or the Batcave itself, confidence and experience guided every decision they made. Seeing the assembled power, heroes current and retired all focused on one simple plan, Terry couldn’t help but think: Grandfather is good, but he’s 87 years old. What could go wrong?

entry.title: Hands Up
entry.summary:
Author: Burning_Sands999

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,725Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 67

Summary: Bruce subtly tucks the bullet’s remains into his sleeve and adds his hands to Clark’s stomach as well, to better hide the fact that there’s no wound. "Ow?” Clark groans quietly, raising an eyebrow at Bruce. "Yes, ow,” He hisses, glancing quickly over to the shooter,” Bullets are supposed to hurt, Clark.” Or: Clark just wanted to deposit a check, and now there's a gunman in the bank. Great.

entry.title: But you can't take the circus from the boy
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,201Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 141

Summary: Damian Wayne has everything he's ever wanted. A beautiful husband. A precious child. A title of his own. Even his siblings, having experienced horrors beyond their years, are growing as people alongside him. But with everything in his life moving so smoothly, he can't help but wonder when the other shoe will drop. Happiness isn't something that comes easily to Demons, after all.

entry.title: Coming Home to You
entry.summary:
Author: RandomFan001

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,872Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 234

Summary: Clark had long given up his dream of finding his soulmate. The weird feeling he had when his eyes met Batman’s wasn’t anything but nerves and attraction. Definitely not. But when his instincts start acting up, he starts to suspect it’s something else. Worst of all, so does Batman. Featuring; healthy co-parenting, a healthy amount of pining, and a story about finding love and family

entry.title: All The Things We Cannot See
entry.summary:
Author: Ivasa

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,960Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 22

Summary: People disappear in Gotham every day. It is Batman’s job to find them. His job becomes significantly harder when Matches Malone keeps running into a very persistent rookie reporter from Metropolis. A reporter who keeps showing up exactly where he shouldn’t be. Seriously, how does this kid keep finding him???

entry.summary:
Author: Dumbgreedycrow

entry.title: Man of Steel, Heart of Glass
entry.summary:
Author: glitter_gutz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,679Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Bruce hates how Clark treats him like a petulant child, but he craves the adrenaline of being with the city's golden boy. Their intimacy is a battlefield. And it's marked by biting, scratching, and grip so tight it bruises. Proud marks that prove they were the ones to break the other’s composure. It’s a toxic, addictive cycle where the only time they feel truly close is when they are tearing each other apart and putting themselves back together.

entry.title: Arisen The Bat
entry.summary:
Author: dexpair

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 60,192Chapters: 12/71Kudos: 14

Summary: On the streets of a Neo Gotham, old man Bruce Wayne lived his life as quite as possible. No more hero stuff, no more meetings with The League in space. His days were filled with silly conversations with his husband or listening to the dramas of his teenage son. It was an opposite reality to the one he had lived his whole life, but that's what made it special for him. However, on a special day, Bruce discovers that getting rid of his past life wouldn't be so easy. Ghosts from the past have returned, this time haunting his children, and The Dark Knight realizes he will have to act for his city and his family one last time.

  • Major Character Death

  • Dick Grayson/Koriand'r

entry.title: like grey skies (like a bird of paradise)
entry.summary:
Author: rainbow_nerds

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,372Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 378

Summary: He sighed to himself and downed the glass of champagne he'd been nursing—non-alcoholic, but enough to convince anyone who might give him a passing glance. He hated this, every time he had to do it. There was one surefire way to derail anyone who began wondering whether maybe Bruce Wayne was doing more than just donating funds to Batman.His tie hung loose around his neck, shirt unbuttoned to halfway down his chest, laughing too easily, pressing close to everyone he spoke to, whispering in ears, playing the part, until he turned and froze on the spot.Clark Kent, in his signature ill-fitting suit, stood holding a notebook and pen, staring at him with barely-concealed glee.Bruce cringed internally. He hated this. He especially hated when it had to be witnessed by someone he actually respected.or: After a Gala, Bruce and Clark end up in bed together. They're friends, just helping each other out, no strings attached. Which would be great, if Bruce hadn't been halfway to head-over-heels since the day they met.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
